REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS ADAM KLEINBERG, GLORIA KLEINBERG AND FIRST TEAM PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH FACTS SUPPORTING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION UNDER SFRO 37.9(F), I.E. THAT LANDLORD SERVED A NOTICE TO QUIT A RENTAL UNIT, MADE A DEMAND FOR POSSESSION OF A RENTAL UNIT, OR PROSECUTION AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION IN VIOLATION OF THE ORDINANCE. PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT FACTS SUPPORTING CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION CURRENTLY ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT ARE SUFFICIENT TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION UNDER SFRO 37.9(F). PLAINTIFF ALREADY ALLEGES CAUSES OF ACTION FOR TENANT HARASSMENT AND BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY AND DOES NOT SUPPORT ITS ARGUMENT THAT THEY MAY SERVE AS THE BASIS FOR A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF SFRO 37.9(F) WITH ANY AUTHORITY. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION, VIOLATION OF SAN FRANISCO ADMINISTRATIVE CODE SETION 27.9 (WRONGFUL EVICTION) (TRANSACTION ID # 67046822)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Continued To Jan-19-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS ADAM KLEINBERG, GLORIA KLEINBERG AND FIRST TEAM PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts supporting a cause of action for wrongful eviction under SFRO 37.9(f), i.e. that landlord served a notice to quit a rental unit, made a demand for possession of a rental unit, or prosecution an Unlawful Detainer action in violation of the Ordinance. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that facts supporting constructive eviction currently alleged in the complaint are sufficient to state a cause of action for wrongful eviction under SFRO 37.9(f). Plaintiff already alleges causes of action for tenant harassment and breach of warranty of habitability and does not support its argument that they may serve as the basis for a cause of action for violation of SFRO 37.9(f) with any authority.

Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
